workshop.universe.publishing.notice: మీరు యూనివర్స్‌ను ప్రచురించడం లేదానికి అనుమతించడం లేదు, యూనివర్స్‌తో మొత్తం కనెక్ట్ చేయబడిన మొదటి కథ ప్రచురించబడినప్పుడు అదనపులు ప్రచురించబడుతుంది.

workshop.universe.rating.desc: ఈ రేటింగ్ పైన ఉన్న కథలు యూనివర్స్ పేజీ లిస్టింగ్‌ను అనామకం యూజర్లు మరియు పాత్రాలకు ఉచితంగా చూపిస్తుంది.
workshop.story.cannon.desc.create: ఈ కథ ఒక కాననిక కథానాయకంగా సృష్టించబడుతుంది {universe} యూనివర్స్ లో.

workshop.story.publishing.notice: మీరు మొదటి అధ్యాయం ప్రచురించిన తరువాత కథ స్వయంచాలకంగా ప్రచురించబడుతుంది.

workshop.fictionalTime.title: కథ కోసం కాలం నిర్వచించండి {universeName}
workshop.fictionalTime.none: You currently don't have any fictional times set-up.
workshop.fictionalTime.formDescription:
Here you can create your own fictional time. Currently, this tool is limited and is only capable of creating
        symmetric times. This means you won't be able to recreate the Mayan calendar or the Gregorian calendar. At this moment,
        this tool expects that all time periods are always the same, e.g., months always have 30 days with no exceptions and so
        on. We will address this in later versions, but until then, this tool is more suited for creating primarily
        sci-fi based time systems.
workshop.fictionalTime.linkedToET: Does this time start on an Earth date (Gregorian calendar)?
workshop.fictionalTime.declarationLocati: Where should the time name be declared?
workshop.fictionalTime.unitsDescFirst: How many units are there in this unit from milliseconds?
workshop.fictionalTime.unitsDesc: How many units is this one from the previous one?
fictionalTime.pageStartElapsedTime: Time elapsed since opening this page
workshop.shoppingExternal.explainer: If your story is sold elsewhere you can set the links here. The links will then show instead of the content or at the end of the content you choose to preview.
workshop.shoppingExternal.copyFromOrigin: Pre-fill this translation's links with the values from the original. Review and save to apply.
workshop.shoppingExternal.originalReadOn: Only collaborators can edit the original story's external sales links. Switch to a translation tab to edit links for your language.
workshop.writerSidebar.title: Sidebar Toolbox
workshop.writerSidebar.description: Welcome to your story! This sidebar allows you easy access to all resources related to your story. Check the icons above to see latest comments, your notes and much more!
workshop.story.authorsNotesExplained: మీ చిత్రకథ ప్రారంభంలో చదవాల్సిన నాటకాన్ని చూడటానికి మీకు మెనంబర్లకు చెప్పిన గమనిక.

workshop.shortStory.toggleDescription: A self-contained single-chapter story up to ~8,000 words (~16,000 characters for Chinese, Japanese, and Korean). The chapter title matches the story title automatically.
workshop.shortStory.titleLocked: Short stories share the story title — edit it in Settings.
workshop.shortStory.overHardLimit: Short stories are limited to {limit, number} {metric, select, words {words} other {characters}}. Currently: {count, number}.
workshop.shortStory.softWarning: Approaching the short-story length limit ({count, number}/{limit, number}).
workshop.shortStory.dashboardIntro: Open the editor to write or revise. The chapter title stays in sync with the story title.
workshop.ratingAdjusted: Due to complains we had to adjust your rating to the one that we felt appropriate. As such changing the rating is now disabled.
workshop.rating.disabled.sexualContent: Rating is locked to Explicit (21+) because you selected Sexual Content in content warnings.
workshop.contentWarnings.title: Content Warnings
workshop.contentWarnings.description: Select applicable content warnings to inform readers about potentially sensitive content
workshop.contentWarnings.graphicViolence: Detailed descriptions of violent acts, including but not limited to physical harm, bloodshed, mutilation, or any other explicit depictions of violence that may be considered disturbing or excessively graphic.
workshop.contentWarnings.profanity.descr: Excessive or obscene swearing and cursing.
workshop.contentWarnings.sensitiveConten: Descriptions of torture, slavery, substance abuse, mental illness, addiction, mentions of rape, self-harm or any other content that may be considered traumatizing or mature that does not fall under the warning tags. This content is not glorified.
workshop.contentWarnings.sexualContent.d: Explicit sexual content (text only), descriptive sex scenes. This will automatically set the rating to Explicit (21+).
workshop.universe.isAIGenerated: Is the content of the universe generated by AI?
workshop.universe.isAIGeneratedTooltip: Please let us know if any of the content in the universe was generated by or with the help of AI. We use this information for proper labeling and due to how AI programs are generated there might be some limitations and restrictions.
workshop.story.isAIGenerated: Is the story generated by AI?
workshop.story.isAIGeneratedTooltip: Please let us know if any of the story was generated by or with the help of AI. We use this information for proper labeling and due to how AI programs are generated there might be some limitations and restrictions.
workshop.publicationAgreement.intro: We are happy that you have chosen to publish your creative work with us. Before we proceed we just need you to look over our publication agreement, to understand what it means from the legal side of things.
workshop.sortChapters.aria: Select for which way to sort chapter listing
workshop.statusChange.modalTop: Are you sure you want to change the status to
workshop.statusExplain.hiatus1: Hiatus means that you are stepping away from working on this story for a while for what ever reason. It will tell your readers that they should not expect any new updates in the coming weeks or even up to few months.
workshop.statusExplain.hiatus2: The hiatus status will be automatically lifted if you publish any chapter. Or you can change it your self.
workshop.statusExplain.hiatus3: If you keep your story in hiatus for six months, we will automatically mark this story as cancelled.
workshop.statusExplain.cancelled1: We are sorry to hear that you can't continue working on the story. On the other hand we are happy that you are willing to let your readers know.
workshop.statusExplain.cancelled2: Cancelling story will let your readers know that they should not expect any new updates.
workshop.statusExplain.cancelled3: You can always revert this by publishing a chapter or changing the status.
workshop.statusExplain.finished1: Congratulations! After all that hard work you have finally reached the end of an incredible journey. While the story might end now, we hope that there will be more stories to tell in the future, but for now, relax and enjoy the well earned rest.
workshop.statusExplain.finished2: Marking story as complete will tell the readers that the story is finished. While you shouldn't be adding any new chapters we won't stop you and adding special chapters isn't a bad idea, to for example add more epilogues for all characters.
workshop.statusExplain.finished3: While you can always cancel this status we highly advice against it. If the story is to continue it might be better to start a new story.
workshop.statusChangeEmail.storyIntro: We would like to inform you that your story:
workshop.statusChangeEmail.hiatusTitle: Your story status was automatically set to hiatus
workshop.statusChangeEmail.hiatusIntro: Due to inactivity your story status was automatically set to hiatus.
workshop.statusChangeEmail.hiatusWhy: Has been automatically put on hiatus due to no new chapter being published for over 6 months.
workshop.statusChangeEmail.hiatusWhatFol: This status will be automatically lifted if you publish a new chapter. If you don't publish a new chapter in the next 6 months we will automatically set the story as cancelled.
workshop.statusChangeEmail.cancellationI: Your story status was automatically set to cancelled.
workshop.statusChangeEmail.cancellationW: This has happened because you haven't posted any new chapter to the story since it was set to hiatus 6 months ago. After a year of inactivity, we automatically set stories to cancelled so that readers know which stories are active.
This status will be automatically lifted if you publish a new chapter. If you don't plan to work on this story anymore there is nothing else that you need to do.

workshop.videoTrailer.rumble: మేము రూంబల్‌ను కూడా మద్దతు చేస్తాము, కానీ మీరు IFRAME URL ని కాపీ చేయాలి.
workshop.videoTrailer.suggestPlatforms: మీ వీడియో ప్లాట్ఫారం లేదా, మనకు తెలియజేయండి మా అభిప్రాయం ద్వారా!
workshop.collaborator.leaveTitle: Please confirm that you want to leave {workName}
workshop.collaborator.leaveExplained: Leaving project will mean that you will loose all access, association and privileges. If you are not sure what all of this means, then this is probably not what you wanted to click.
workshop.aiGeneratedAdjusted: The AI generation status of this content has been adjusted, as a result of a user report, by an administrator and cannot be changed.
workshop.universe.preventPublishingToolt: When enabled, no stories in this universe can be published. This is useful for universes that are still in development or for universes that are meant for private use only.
workshop.story.preventPublishingTooltip: When enabled, this story cannot be published. This is useful for stories that are still in development or for stories that are meant for private use only.
workshop.story.preventPublishingTooltipU: Publishing is prevented because the universe has the prevent publishing setting enabled.
workshop.story.showChapterNumbersInListi: Show chapter numbers in chapter listing
When enabled, chapter numbers are visible to readers in story chapter listings.
workshop.revisions.new.public.disabled: Cannot publish while prevent publishing is enabled in story settings.
workshop.publishing.restricted: Due to good conduct violation we have disabled your ability to publish.
workshop.story.delete.modalAria: Confirmation modal for deleting a story
workshop.story.delete.warning: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
workshop.story.private.universeExplain: This story is private because its universe is private.
workshop.universe.makePublic.only.modalA: Confirmation modal for making a universe public only
workshop.universe.makePublic.only.warnin: This makes only the universe public. Stories in this universe stay private until made public individually.
workshop.universe.makePublic.withStories: Make Universe and All Stories Public
Confirmation modal for making a universe and all stories public
This makes the universe and all linked stories public.
workshop.chapter.delete.modalAria: Confirmation modal for deleting a chapter
workshop.chapter.delete.warning: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
workshop.chapter.aiGenerated.tooltip: Mark this chapter as containing AI-generated content
workshop.chapter.aiGenerated.description: This chapter contains content that was generated with AI assistance.
workshop.chapter.aiModel.tooltip: Select the AI model that was used to generate content
workshop.chapter.aiModel.custom.placehol: Enter the name of the AI model
workshop.chapter.aiGenerated.locked: AI content marking cannot be changed because it has been adjusted by the moderation team.
workshop.monetization.aiNotEligible: AI-generated content is not eligible for monetization.
workshop.timer.breakMessage: Take a moment to rest. Click anywhere to dismiss.
workshop.timer.tabInactive: Timer paused - switch back to tab to continue
workshop.timer.type.timer.desc: Simple stopwatch that starts at 0:00 and counts upward. Perfect for tracking total writing time in a session or seeing how long you've been working continuously. Never ends automatically - you control when to stop.
workshop.timer.type.countdown.desc: Countdown timer that starts from your set duration and counts down to zero. Great for time-boxed writing sessions, word sprints, or when you want to work for a specific amount of time before taking a break.
workshop.timer.type.pomodoro.desc: Structured productivity technique: 25-minute focused work sessions alternating with 5-minute breaks. After 4 cycles, takes a longer 15-30 minute break. Scientifically proven to improve focus and prevent burnout.
workshop.timer.mode.regular.desc: Timer runs continuously regardless of your activity. Best for disciplined writers who want to track time even when researching, editing, or taking short breaks. Timer keeps going when you switch tabs or stop typing.
workshop.timer.mode.improved.desc: Smart timer that automatically pauses when you switch browser tabs. Perfect for focused writing sessions where you want accurate tracking of actual writing time, not total time spent on the page.
workshop.timer.breakType.soft.desc: Gentle reminder approach: Shows a small notification when break time starts. You can choose to continue working if you're in 'the zone' or take the break. Good for flexible writers who sometimes need to extend productive sessions.
workshop.timer.breakType.hard.desc: Strict enforcement: Displays a full-screen modal that prevents further input until the break timer completes. Forces you to step away from the keyboard. Ideal for writers who struggle with self-discipline or workaholics who need enforced rest periods.
workshop.timer.duration.timer.desc: How long you plan to write in this session. Start with 25-50 minutes for focused work, or set longer sessions (2-4 hours) for deep writing days.
workshop.timer.duration.countdown.desc: Target writing time before the timer ends. Try 25 minutes for focused sprints, 45-60 minutes for substantial work sessions, or 90 minutes for creative deep dives.
workshop.timer.workDuration.desc: Length of focused work sessions. Traditional Pomodoro uses 25 minutes. Try 15-20 minutes if you find it hard to concentrate for longer periods, or 45-50 minutes for experienced writers who can maintain deep focus.
workshop.timer.breakDuration.desc: Rest period between work sessions. Standard is 5 minutes for short breaks. Use 10-15 minutes for longer breaks that allow you to step away from your desk, stretch, or get a drink. Every 4th break is automatically longer (2-3x duration).
workshop.llmstxt.blocked: Blocked - LLMs cannot access your content
workshop.llmstxt.limited: Limited - LLMs can only access meta data
workshop.llmstxt.free: Free - LLMs can access your content for free
workshop.llmstxt.paid: Paid - LLMs can access your content for a fee (coming soon)

workshop.ai.llmstxt.full: Content LLMs.txt - Full content for AI

workshop.ai.assistant.llms.description: These endpoints provide your universe content in a format optimized for Large Language Models and AI systems.

workshop.ai.assistant.encyclopedia.listi: Complete encyclopedia with all entries organized by categories and links to detailed content.
workshop.ai.assistant.access.title: AI Access Settings
workshop.ai.assistant.access.description: Choose how AI systems can reach your LLMs.txt endpoints.
workshop.ai.assistant.access.denied: Only collaborators can change AI access levels.
workshop.story.publisherPreview.heading: Publisher Preview
workshop.story.publisherPreview.descript: Upload a special preview file for publishers viewing your Author's Resume. This file is stored securely and only accessible to publishers.
workshop.story.publisherPreview.freeStor: This story is free. Consider generating a full EPUB below instead of uploading a separate preview — publishers can access the complete work.
workshop.story.publisherPreview.uploaded: A publisher preview file has been uploaded for this story.
workshop.monetization.arcPricingHelp: Set individual pricing for each story arc. Each arc is a separate product in Stripe and is synced automatically when you save.
workshop.monetization.errorNoPrice: Please set at least one price.
workshop.monetization.freePreviewHelp: Set how many chapters from the beginning of your story are free for anyone to read. This helps attract readers.
workshop.monetization.noArcs: No story arcs defined yet. Add arcs in the story arcs section above.
workshop.monetization.noCurrencies: Add currencies to set prices for this edition.
workshop.monetization.priceBounds: Minimum {min}. Maximum {max}. Standard platform cut: {platformCut, number}% once it exceeds the low-price flat fee.
workshop.monetization.priceEstimate: {feeMode} Creator pool: {payout}. Platform fee: {platformFee}. Estimated Stripe fee inside that platform fee: {stripeFee}. Estimated platform keep after Stripe: {platformNet}.
workshop.monetization.pricingHelp: Set prices in the currencies you want to support. Prices are entered in display format, for example 4.99 or 500 for zero-decimal currencies.
workshop.monetization.purchaseModeHelp: Choose how readers can buy your story. Full story sells the entire story. Per-arc lets readers buy individual story arcs. Both allows either option.
workshop.monetization.splitHelp: Payout splits are edited as gross-sale percentages. The platform row is fixed by the story license, and the creator rows fill the remainder.
workshop.monetization.translationPricing: This translation is sold as its own Stripe product. Readers buying this edition get access to the {language} version only.

{count, plural, one {The translation {languages} does not have pricing configured.} other {{languages} do not have pricing configured.}} Readers will not be able to purchase {count, plural, one {this translation} other {these translations}} until pricing is set.
workshop.revShare.mustMatchCreatorShare: Creator rows must add up to {creatorShare, number}% because platform share is fixed at {platformShare, number}%.
workshop.revShare.ownerLocked: The story owner must remain part of the payout split.
workshop.revShare.platformFixed: Platform share is fixed at {platformShare, number}% for this license. Creator rows split the remaining {creatorShare, number}%.
workshop.collaborators.monetizedNotice: This story is monetized. Invitees must complete Stripe payout setup before they can accept. You can propose a revenue share below — it will be taken from your share.
workshop.collaborators.splitFromOwnerSha: This will be taken from your share. The invitee must complete Stripe payout setup before they can accept.
workshop.monetization.arcManagementHelp: Define the arcs of your story by setting chapter ranges. Each arc can be sold separately.
workshop.monetization.lowPriceWarning: At this price, the flat-fee minimum applies. Your payout will be lower than the standard {platformCut, number}% split. Consider pricing at {thresholdPrice} or above for the best creator payout.
workshop.monetization.recommendedPrice: Recommended price based on story length ({wordCount, number} {countLabel}): {price}.
workshop.ai.chat.noKey: Add an API key for OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI, or Google in your settings to use the AI assistant.
workshop.ai.chat.noAccess: Only the story author and collaborators can use the AI assistant.
workshop.ai.chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
workshop.ai.chat.noMessages: Start a conversation about your story. The assistant knows about your story, universe, and encyclopedia.
workshop.ai.chat.webSearch.hint: Let the assistant search the web for this message
workshop.ai.chat.createError: Failed to start a new conversation. Please try again.
workshop.ai.chat.findInEditor: Click to find this passage in the editor
workshop.ai.chat.modelLocked: Start a new conversation to change the model.
workshop.ai.proposal.label: Entry proposal
workshop.ai.proposal.reviewHint: Confirm to add this as a WIP encyclopedia draft. You can change the name or category first.
aiChat.image.fieldTitle.label: Field title
workshop.settings.name: Blog name
workshop.theWay.overallStats.wordCountDe: Total words across all your stories
workshop.theWay.overallStats.encyclopedi: Total encyclopedia entries you have created
workshop.theWay.overallStats.fansDesc: People who have subscribed to your fan club
workshop.theWay.overallStats.uniqueReade: Unique visitors who have read your stories
workshop.theWay.overallStats.storyViewsD: Total views across all your stories
workshop.theWay.overallStats.universeVie: Total views across all your universes
workshop.theWay.overallStats.readingTime: Total time readers spent on your content
workshop.theWay.overallStats.topCountryD: Most of your readers come from this country
workshop.theWay.overallStats.topAgeGroup: Most of your readers belong to this age group
workshop.monetization.fanFictionNotEligi: Fan Fiction is not elegible for monetization
workshop.license.exclusiveUniverse: The universe uses an exclusive license, which means that all stories also have to follow the same license in order to prevent legal chaos.
workshop.work.isPreview: Is the story here only to preview the work?
